head.hi: The Netherland Legation to the Department of State
head.note: Notation on original by the Adviser on Political Relations (Hornbeck): “Taken up with Captain Schuirmann [Captain Roscoe E. Schuirmann, Office of Naval Operations]”.

div.p: The Netherlands Government requests the U. S. Government to be good enough to instruct the U. S. authorities in the Philippines to inform the Netherlands Consul General at Manila of any imminent Japanese danger in order that he may [be] enabled to inform the Netherlands Foreign Minister in London and the Governor General of the Netherlands Indies.
